ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., QB, RB, TE) */,
  "span" TEXT /* Span of years the player played in the NFL */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player played for */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that drafted the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_draft_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("draft_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., QB, RB, TE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "offensive" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the position is an offensive position */,
  "defensive" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the position is a defensive position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "per_game" REAL /* Average performance per game */,
  "per_season" REAL /* Average performance per season */,
  "best_season" INTEGER /* Best season performance */,
  "passing_yards" REAL /* Total passing yards */,
  "rushing_yards" REAL /* Total rushing yards */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total touchdowns */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Total interceptions (for QBs) */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Total fumbles */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Total sacks (for QBs and defensive players) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (home or away) */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "season_performance" REAL /* Performance of the player in that season */,
  "passing_yards" REAL /* Total passing yards in the season */,
  "rushing_yards" REAL /* Total rushing yards in the season */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total touchdowns in the season */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Total interceptions in the season (for QBs) */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Total fumbles in the season */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Total sacks in the season (for QBs and defensive players) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., MVP, Rookie of the Year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "recovery_time" INTEGER /* Estimated recovery time in weeks */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspensions" (
  "suspension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspension */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "suspension_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the suspension */,
  "suspension_date" TEXT /* Date of the suspension */,
  "suspension_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the suspension in games */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the player is eligible to return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suspensions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Value of the contract */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in years */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "guaranteed_amount" REAL /* Guaranteed amount in the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the player */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Any additional bonuses the player received */,
  "base_salary" REAL /* Base salary of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drafts" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year of the draft */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round of the draft */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college_position" TEXT /* Position the player played in college */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pro_bowls" (
  "pro_bowl_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pro Bowl appearance */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "pro_bowl_year" INTEGER /* Year of the Pro Bowl */,
  "pro_bowl_team" TEXT /* Team the player represented in the Pro Bowl */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pro_bowl_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pro_bowls_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "all_pros" (
  "all_pro_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each All-Pro selection */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "all_pro_year" INTEGER /* Year of the All-Pro selection */,
  "all_pro_team" TEXT /* Team the player represented in the All-Pro selection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("all_pro_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_all_pros_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
